description_long: This house features a modern, modular design with a series of blue rectangular units arranged in a linear fashion, connected by a light gray pathway or deck. The structure includes a prominent dark, box-like section at one end, possibly serving as a garage or main entryway, with a textured roof. The main living area appears to be composed of multiple repeating modules, each with large window-like features, suggesting ample natural light. The roof is primarily flat, with some sections showing a grid or panel pattern. The exterior materials appear to be a mix of concrete, glass, and metal, giving the house a contemporary urban feel. The overall layout is elongated, with clear separation between the main living modules and the auxiliary structure.
description: A modern, modular house with blue rectangular living units, a flat roof, and a dark, box-like entry or garage section, connected by a light gray pathway.
description_view_0: Shows the full length of the house, highlighting the blue modular units and the dark entry/garage section on the right.
description_view_1: Emphasizes the linear arrangement of the blue modules and the prominent dark box at the front, with the pathway extending outward.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the stacked blue modules and the flat, grid-patterned roof, with the dark section at the left end.
description_view_3: Rear perspective showing the repeating blue modules and the wraparound pathway, with the dark section now at the far end.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is integrated into a dark, box-like section with a flat roof, likely featuring a large door and minimal decorative elements.
